name: Palemo Holdings Co.,Ltd.
summary: Palemo Holdings Co.,Ltd. owns and operates a chain of specialty stores for women's apparel, variety goods, and bags in Japan. The company is also involved in the delivery agency business. As of February 20, 2020, it operated 487 stores. The company was formerly known as Palemo Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Palemo Holdings Co.,Ltd. in August 2017. The company was incorporated in 1976 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.
